title: AIIMS Kalyani – NMHS Survey Field Data Collector – 3 Posts
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 3 NMHS Survey Field Data Collector posts. Candidates with a Master’s degree in Psychology, Social Work, Sociology, Rural Development, or related fields can apply through email mode before 31-05-2026 via the official AIIMS Kalyani website.
